title: TRUSTED BY MORE THAN 500k MONTHLY ACTIVE DEVELOPERS GLOBALLY

testimonials.author: Yuval Hazaz
testimonials.text: We adopted Prisma conventions as our standard and it saves lots of time having from reinventing things ourselves.
testimonials.title: CEO

testimonials.author: Matti Nannt
testimonials.title: Co-founder
testimonials.text: Thanks to Prisma, we can seamlessly scale our applications, without concerns about data layer performance.

testimonials.author: Steven Tey
testimonials.title: Founder
testimonials.text:
Underrated: Prisma 🐐
Entire SaaS businesses have been built on top of the Prisma ecosystem— including OSS ones like Dub.co. Have been loving the recent performance improvements as well 🔥

testimonials.author: Niko Guerra
testimonials.title: Senior Backend Engineering Manager
testimonials.text: With Prisma, we migrated a core production system from MySQL to SQL Server with zero downtime, simply by swapping a few references and updating our schema. I can't imagine building systems without it; it's instrumental to major projects at Lush.

testimonials.title: Head of Mobile
testimonials.author: Tom Hutchinson
testimonials.text: Prisma helps us unify data access from multiple enterprise systems into a single API. It means we can move very quickly whilst staying flexible.

testimonials.author: Martin Adams
testimonials.title: Founder
testimonials.text: Prisma Postgres has really good DX. It's easy, simple, straightforward. I don't spend time on deployment. It just works.

testimonials.author: Ricardo Almeida
testimonials.title: Software Engineer
testimonials.text: Prisma has a low learning curve. Productivity becomes higher because it gets combined with end-to-end type-safety using TypeScript.

testimonials.author: Jonathan Wilke
testimonials.title: Frontend Dev
testimonials.text: I have been using Prisma since day one, and it has become my number one choice for ORM. It's the default in @supastarter, and even though things like Drizzle might be more lightweight, the DX of Prisma is just unbeaten.

testimonials.author: Nicolás Torres
testimonials.title: Fullstack Engineer
testimonials.text: It's the kind of DX that lets me get stuff done in between my daughter's naps.

testimonials.author: Harshdeep Singh Hura
testimonials.title: Shopify App Developer and Consultant
testimonials.text: Prisma Accelerate handled 670,000+ webhooks from Shopify when the orders webhook from 2022/23 was fired, which cost us about $11. Not bad for accidentally being DDoS'd to a Heroku Postgres instance with zero downtime, and all the entries made it through.

testimonials.author: Dries Augustyns
testimonials.title: Founder
testimonials.text: Prisma spares me the hassle of keeping my database in sync, allowing me to develop my product with complete confidence.

testimonials.author: Daniel Cranney
testimonials.title: Developer Advocate
testimonials.text: I like how the Prisma docs made it easy to jump straight into using it without needing to do a huge amount of reading, and I instantly felt the benefits.

testimonials.title: Experimenting with LLM powered apps
testimonials.text: Huge fan of Prisma! The Schema file is great for Cursor. You literally never have to write a CRUD operation again.

testimonials.author: Joonatan
testimonials.title: Building
testimonials.text: I've been building the backend on @stockleapp, with Prisma since the beginning, and I've got to say, it has worked like a charm

testimonials.author: Ian Hunter
testimonials.title: Pushing electrons
testimonials.text: I keep switching from Prisma to whatever the latest flavor is, but always end up coming back to Prisma.

testimonials.author: Blake Carroll
testimonials.title: CTO
testimonials.text: Accelerate is a perfect fit for landing pages. We take advantage of caching to speed up queries and reduce latency, making them lightning-fast. This means we have a faster landing page, leading to better conversion.

testimonials.author: Elie Steinbock
testimonials.title: Founder
testimonials.text: I love how Prisma makes my life as a developer so easy. The TypeScript autocompletion is the best I've used, having tried many different ORMs. The migrations are a breeze. And I love how easy it is to get a full view of your database from the Prisma schema file. It's all in one place in readable format.

testimonials.author: Zai Chi
testimonials.title: Co-founder
testimonials.text: I love the Prisma typing system! Stack Auth relies heavily on it.

testimonials.author: Cody Bontecou
testimonials.title: Founder
testimonials.text: Prisma enabled me to easily manage authentication as well as users' paid status. Prisma Accelerate was a huge boost to my productivity, cutting latency issues I was encountering with Vercel SQL.

testimonials.author: Nevo David
testimonials.title: Founder
testimonials.text: What I love most about Postiz is Prisma. It lets me switch between SQL databases effortlessly. I've used other ORMs before such as Eloquent (Laravel), but nothing matches Prisma's typing and features!

testimonials.author: Harshal Patil
testimonials.title: Staff Engineer
testimonials.text: Prisma's typesafe SQL is a great feature. It fills a great abstraction gap that existed prior to this. Earlier, I would have to fall back straight to pgtyped.

testimonials.author: Chris Lis
testimonials.title: Dev Educator
testimonials.text: Imagine never typing out a migration again. Yeah, that's basically what Prisma does for you. Has saved me literal hours of time, and can for you too.

testimonials.author: Shuhrat Saipov
testimonials.title: Co-founder
testimonials.text: Prisma has been instrumental in building ReUI, by providing a fully abstracted database layer. It accelerated our development speed several times over, letting us focus on business logic with a beautiful API and top-notch transaction support.

testimonials.author: Jim Hendriks
testimonials.title: Tech Lead
testimonials.text: For myBeat, we migrated our legacy codebase to Prisma very easily using Prisma ORM's introspection feature as we were moving from CakePHP to Node.js.
